member.office_address: 1208 Longworth House Office Building Washington DC 20515-1408

form_analysis.form_header_text: Rep. Mark Messmer FY27 Appropriations Request Forms
form_analysis.form_instructions_text: This form will close on March 6, 2026 at 11:59PM. Please provide all information as appropriate to complete your request. Incomplete forms may result in your request not receiving proper consideration. If you have any questions, please reach out to Will.Salmon@mail.house.gov

sections.description: General information regarding the organization and contact people submitting this request.

fields.label: 1. Requesting Group/Company:
2. Requesting Group/Company Contact Information (Name, Affiliation, Email, Contact Number):
3. Requesting Group/Company Mailing Address:
5. Requesting Group's Representative/D.C. Point of Contact (Must Include: Name, Affiliation, Email, Contact Number):

sections.description: Basic details about the type and jurisdiction of the appropriations request.

fields.label:
4. Please identify the type of request: 

NOTE: Each request requires an individual form, if you have multiple requests please fill out a separate form for each - this includes programmatic requests with language associated.
fields.help_text: NOTE: Each request requires an individual form, if you have multiple requests please fill out a separate form for each - this includes programmatic requests with language associated.
fields.rationale: The request is for a specific programmatic funding amount ($9,000,000,000) for NASA's Science Mission Directorate, which is categorized as a funding request in the provided context.

fields.label: 6. Title of Request (e.g. short title for easy identification of requirement/legislative language)
fields.rationale: This value is based on the 'Short Title' provided in the programmatic request context.

fields.label: 7. Select the Subcommittee of jurisdiction for this request:
options: Agriculture, Rural Development, Food and Drug Administration, and Related Agencies
Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies
Energy and Water Development, and Related Agencies
Labor, Health and Human Services, Education, and Related Agencies
Military Construction, Veterans Affairs, and Related Agencies
National Security, Department of State, and Related Programs
Transportation, and Housing and Urban Development, and Related Agencies
fields.draft_value: Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies
fields.rationale: NASA appropriations fall under the jurisdiction of the Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies Subcommittee.

fields.label: 8. Department (if applicable)
fields.rationale: Standard department-level identification for NASA requests.

fields.label:
9. Please provide the following information under which this project would be funded:
     Agency:  
     Account:  
     Agency Subdivision:
     Program:
     Activity:
fields.help_text: Provide information regarding the specific Agency, Account, Agency Subdivision, Program, and Activity.
fields.draft_value:
* Agency: NASA
* Account: Science
* Agency Subdivision: Science Mission Directorate
* Program: Science Mission Directorate
* Activity: Planetary Science, Earth Science, Astrophysics, Heliophysics, and Biological & Physical Sciences
fields.rationale: Follows the standard budget account structure for the NASA Science Mission Directorate as detailed in the reference values.

sections.description: Specifics on the funding amount requested and how it relates to historical levels.

fields.label: 10. Funding request for FY 2027:
options: Support total funding level of (enter amount in next question)
Support the President's FY27 budget request
fields.draft_value: Support total funding level of (enter amount in next question)
fields.rationale: The request specifies a precise dollar amount ($9 billion) which is an increase over previous enacted levels and the FY25 request. Selecting this option allows for the input of that specific strategic target in the subsequent field.

fields.label: 11. If entered "Support total funding level of" above, please enter amount:
fields.rationale: Utilizes the exact 'Funding Ask' figure provided in the reference context.

fields.label: 14. Amount/policy included specifically for this item in the President's budget request for FY 2027 (if available):
fields.draft_value: Currently unknown (President's Budget Request has not been released)
fields.rationale: The reference values state the FY2027 PBR is currently unknown.

fields.label: 15. Provide the amount increase/decrease over the previously enacted amount:
fields.draft_value:
* $1,750,000,000 increase over FY2026 enacted level
* FY2026 Enacted: $7,250,000,000
* FY2027 Request: $9,000,000,000
fields.rationale: Calculated based on the difference between the FY2026 enacted amount and the FY2027 request amount provided in the funding history.

fields.label: 16. Federal funding history (E.x. $100,000 in FY17, $150,000 in FY22. Please include the complete funding history.):
fields.rationale: Provides the most recent enacted funding levels for the Science Mission Directorate as specified in the funding history context.

sections.description: Descriptions of the request, required legislative language, and past reports.

fields.label: 12. Description of program request (Please try to be concise):
fields.draft_value:
* Supports NASA's Science Mission Directorate (SMD) at $9 billion to restore mission stability and scientific productivity
* Funds critical portfolios in Planetary Science, Earth Science, and Astrophysics following recent budget disruptions
* Enables continued progress on Decadal Survey priorities to maintain U.S. leadership in space exploration
* Supports the specialized aerospace workforce and talent pipeline that the broader technology economy depends on
fields.rationale: Summarizes the funding goal while highlighting workforce stability and strategic leadership themes from the advocacy context.

fields.label: 13. Bill / Report language required (if any/please keep language as short and concise as possible.):
fields.rationale: The request context specifies that no report or bill language is requested for this programmatic funding item.

fields.label: 17. If this request received Congressional appropriation language in previous years, please list the fiscal year and provide the exact report or bill language as it appears in most recent House, Senate, or Conference report:
fields.rationale: The provided context does not include specific bill or report language from prior years; this requires submitter knowledge.

sections.description: Required rankings, offsets, and the benefit to the Indiana 8th district.

fields.label: 18. Are you making this request to other offices? If yes, please list all offices receiving this request:
fields.draft_value:
* Reps.
* Don Bacon (R-NE) and Judy Chu (D-CA) are leading an existing multi-member House letter in support of this request.
* Request also being submitted to additional House offices.
fields.rationale: Request is being submitted to multiple offices; Bacon/Chu lead the House letter per reference values.

fields.label: 19. Of the requests made by this group in this bill, this request ranks as priority [ ] of [ ] total requests:
fields.rationale: The priority ranking is a subjective decision for the submitter and cannot be determined from the general advocacy context.

fields.label: 20. Why is the request a good use of taxpayer dollars?  Please fully state your justification for use of federal taxpayer dollars:
fields.draft_value:
* Space science delivers a 3-to-1 return on investment, turbocharging the industrial and innovation workforce
* Sustained funding ensures U.S. leadership in the face of rapid expansion of space science ambitions by international competitors like China
* NASA Science missions address Decadal Survey priorities, providing a rigorous, peer-reviewed basis for high-impact federal investment
* Supports thousands of high-tech jobs across the country, maintaining the specialized aerospace capabilities necessary for national security
fields.rationale: Integrates economic ROI data, competitive strategic arguments, and workforce benefits from the advocacy talking points.

fields.label: 21. If requesting a funding increase, please suggest an appropriate offset from this bill:
fields.rationale: Identifying specific budget offsets requires a political determination by the submitter and is not provided in the policy context.

fields.label: 22. Impact on IN-08 and other comments/miscellaneous information:
fields.draft_value:
* Directly supports Energy Systems Group LLC in Evansville, which holds a cumulative contract valued at over $19 million to improve efficiency at NASA Glenn Research Center
* Sustains high-skilled engineering jobs and technical services in the district that support essential NASA operational infrastructure
* Advances the national aerospace economy, which provides a significant return on investment for federal funding through technology transfer
* Inspires local STEM talent by demonstrating the impact of Indiana-based companies on national space exploration goals
fields.rationale: Connects the programmatic request to the specific $19M contract for Energy Systems Group LLC in Evansville as noted in the district spending data.
